item.title: Black Kite | 2025 Black Kite Third Party Breach Report
item.description: Discover how third-party breaches became 2024's top cyber threat. Get key insights and strategies from Black Kite’s 2025 Third-Party Breach Report.

item.title: Black Kite | Black Kite 2025 Ransomware Report
item.description: Get the latest ransomware data. The 2025 Ransomware Report analyzes a 24% surge in attacks, SMB targets, and the growing risk to third-party vendor ecosystems.
